content: The checklist-validator achieved 100% pass rate on all 3 of its iterations (1331/1331, 1326/1326, 1299/1299 — minor count variations due to check structure evolution). Structural validation was never the bottleneck; the system's structural integrity was solid from cycle 1. All convergence effort was spent on semantic and cross-reference issues that only the audit-oracle and gap hunters could detect.
